team_spec.vision: Turn sensor readings or field observations into reviewable evidence packets with public-safe summaries.
team_spec.spec: Build a single-file Python tool, run as `python3 tool.py <observations_json_path>`. Reads JSON shaped { "observations": [ {"observation_id":"...","observation_type":"sensor_reading"|"field_note"|"photo"|"audio"|"manual_count"|"repair_event","source":"...","location":"...","location_precision":"exact"|"site"|"region","time":"YYYY-MM-DD","measurement":<number>|null,"unit":"..."|null,"calibration_state":"calibrated"|"uncalibrated"|"unknown","sensitive_location_flag":<boolean>,"review_state":"reviewed"|"pending"|"contested"|"not-applicable"}, ...] }. For each observation, produce an evidence packet with these public-safe transformations: (a) if sensitive_location_flag is true OR location_precision is 'exact' with sensitive flag true, downgrade location to 'region-level only'; (b) attach calibration confidence: calibrated=high, uncalibrated=low, unknown=unknown; (c) if measurement is null, mark 'qualitative observation' instead of a measurement; (d) reject (skip) observations with empty observation_id, missing observation_type, or invalid date format. Print to stdout in this order: (1) header 'SENSOR-TO-RECEIPT EVIDENCE PACKETS (<N> kept / <M> total)'; (2) blank line; (3) for each kept observation in input order: '- id: <observation_id>', '  type: <observation_type>', '  source: <source>', '  location: <location_or_region-level only>', '  time: <time>', '  data: <measurement> <unit> | qualitative observation', '  calibration_confidence: <high|low|unknown>', '  review_state: <state>', then one blank line; (4) 'SUMMARY: <K> kept, <R> rejected, <S> sensitive-location-redacted of <M> total'. On invalid JSON, single 'error:' line, exit 0. Stdlib only.

excluded_inputs.boundary: Exact GPS coordinates of sensitive monitoring sites are downgraded to region-level in any output.
excluded_inputs.note: the spec applies this transformation; the marker confirms the discipline

review_checks: no exact coords for sensitive sites in output

witness_record_seed.receipt_statement: This record states what happened. It does not establish authority, approval, certification, legitimacy, community consent, or readiness for reuse.
